rationale: The cited paper is not a generic background item: it develops an online marketing model with channel carryover/spillover and MCMC estimation, which closely overlaps with the citing paper’s focus on dynamic digital ad effects, carry-over heterogeneity, and Bayesian/MCMC modeling. The citing note also frames its contribution against prior digital ad-response and retargeting evidence, making this citation plausibly methodological/foundational enough to warrant full relation review.
